---
title: "AI Engineering & R&D at GETGAIN Solutions"
subtitle: "Building Intelligent Systems for Real-World Problems"
author: "Gustavo Reis"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    transition: slide
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    logo: "../logo-getgain.png"
    footer: "GETGAIN Solutions · Gustavo Reis · Senior AI Engineer & R&D Director"
    highlight-style: github-dark
    code-block-bg: true
    code-block-border-left: "#08A299"
    chalkboard: false
    controls: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    margin: 0.08
    css: getgain_style.css
---

# AI Engineering & R&D {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.title-block}
**Gustavo Reis**  
Senior AI Engineer & R&D Director · GETGAIN Solutions  
Lecturer · ESTG IPLeiria
:::

---

## Who is GETGAIN Solutions? {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
- Technology company based in **Marinha Grande, Portugal**
- Specialised in **AI development** and **R&D projects**
- End-to-end delivery: from research to production systems
- Works across diverse **industry verticals**
:::
::: {.column width="45%"}
::: {.info-box}
🏭 **Industry-focused AI**  
We don't build generic solutions —  
we solve domain-specific problems  
with custom AI systems.
:::
:::
:::

---

## About Me {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}
**Senior AI Engineer & R&D Director** @ GETGAIN Solutions

- Design and lead AI/ML systems from concept to deployment
- Specialise in **computer vision**, **NLP**, **time-series forecasting**, and **document intelligence**
- Bridge between research and production-ready engineering

**Lecturer** @ ESTG IPLeiria

- Game Engines & Advanced Game Programming
- Computer Graphics
- AI Applied to Games
:::
::: {.column width="40%"}
::: {.tech-stack-box}
**Core Stack**

`Python` · `C#` · `C++`  
`PyTorch` · `.NET / Blazor`  
`OpenGL` · `Unreal Engine`  
`REST APIs` · `Docker`  
`LLMs / VLMs / OCR`
:::
:::
:::

---

## My Journey into AI Engineering {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.timeline}
::: {.timeline-item}
**🎮 Game Engines & Graphics**  
Started with real-time rendering, C++ engine architecture, physics simulation — building intuition for performance-critical systems.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**📐 Applied Software Engineering**  
Enterprise .NET, REST APIs, desktop apps — connecting AI to real business workflows.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**🤖 AI & Machine Learning**  
Computer vision pipelines, document intelligence, time-series forecasting, LLM integration — applied to real industrial problems.
:::

::: {.timeline-item}
**🔬 R&D Direction**  
Leading research initiatives, evaluating emerging models, writing commercial proposals, designing end-to-end AI systems for clients.
:::
:::

---

## Industry Domains We Serve {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.domain-grid}
::: {.domain-card}
**🐟 Maritime & Fisheries**  
Document intelligence for catch certificates, regulatory compliance automation, OCR pipelines for multi-country processing.
:::

::: {.domain-card}
**🏭 Industrial & Manufacturing**  
AI for production optimisation, BIM automation, engineering drawing analysis, predictive systems for industrial workflows.
:::

::: {.domain-card}
**🔧 Calibration & Metrology**  
Instrument datasheet parsing, calibration matrix generation, equipment integration via real-time communication protocols.
:::

::: {.domain-card}
**📊 Forecasting & Analytics**  
Time-series forecasting for supply chain and sales planning, MRP integration, data pipeline engineering.
:::

::: {.domain-card}
**🔐 Software Licensing & Security**  
Anti-piracy systems, hardware fingerprinting, cryptographic licence management, server-side validation.
:::

::: {.domain-card}
**💬 Conversational AI / RAG**  
Knowledge-base chatbots, natural language database querying, document-grounded Q&A systems.
:::
:::

---

## What We Build: AI Capabilities {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Document Intelligence**

- OCR with Vision-Language Models
- Structured data extraction from PDFs
- Multi-country, multi-format document processing
- Validation logic and pattern enforcement

**Computer Vision**

- Object detection (YOLO-based pipelines)
- Document layout analysis
- Image preprocessing and deskewing
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Language & Reasoning**

- Local LLM deployment (quantised models, GGUF)
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Natural language to SQL
- AI agent design for engineering tasks

**Forecasting & Time Series**

- Transformer-based forecasting (PatchTST)
- Outlier detection and data cleaning
- Integration with ERP/MRP systems
:::
:::

---

## Innovation Topics We Explore {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Local AI Deployment**

Running powerful models on-premise — no data leaves the client's infrastructure. Critical for industries with **data sovereignty** requirements.

```
Vision-Language Models (VLMs)
Quantised LLMs (GGUF / llama.cpp)
GPU-accelerated inference (RTX series)
Batch processing & caching strategies
```
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**AI Agents**

Beyond chatbots — AI systems that **reason and act**: analysing technical drawings, extracting structured data, validating against domain rules, integrating into existing workflows.

```
Tool-use & function calling
Multi-step reasoning pipelines
Domain-specific validation
Human-in-the-loop checkpoints
```
:::
:::

---

## Innovation Topics We Explore {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Time-Series Forecasting**

Transformer architectures applied to real business data — sales forecasting, demand planning, anomaly detection.

> Bridging academic state-of-the-art  
> with production ERP constraints.
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**BIM & Engineering Automation**

Combining **Revit API** development with AI assistants to automate repetitive modelling tasks, extract structured data from drawings, and accelerate engineering workflows.
:::
:::

---

## Bridging Academia & Industry {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}
Teaching at **ESTG IPLeiria** keeps me connected to fundamentals and to the next generation of engineers.

What I bring to students:

- Real project case studies *(sanitised for confidentiality)*
- The gap between research papers and production systems
- Practical tools: Unreal Engine, OpenGL, SDL3, C++
- How AI is reshaping game and software development
:::
::: {.column width="45%"}
::: {.quote-box}
*"The best engineers understand  
both the theory and the trade-offs  
of deploying it in the real world."*
:::

The classroom feeds the lab.  
The lab feeds the classroom.
:::
:::

---

## Key Takeaways {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.takeaway-list}
✅ **AI is most valuable when deeply domain-specific** — generic models need grounding in industry knowledge.

✅ **Local deployment matters** — privacy, latency, and control are real constraints in industrial AI.

✅ **Engineering rigour over hype** — validation, error handling, and integration are 80% of the work.

✅ **R&D and product are not separate** — research should always have a path to deployment.

✅ **Academia and industry need each other** — one pushes boundaries, the other grounds them in reality.
:::

---

## Let's Connect {background-color="#0d1117"}

::: {.connect-block}
**Gustavo Reis**  
Senior AI Engineer & R&D Director · GETGAIN Solutions  
Lecturer · ESTG IPLeiria — Computer Graphics · Game Engines · AI Applied to Games

🌍 Marinha Grande, Portugal  
🏢 GETGAIN Solutions  
🎓 ESTG IPLeiria
:::

::: {.closing-note}
*Questions welcome — I'll share what I can!*
:::
